title: Idle Village
description:
Build, grow then defend your own medieval village in this relaxing idle builder.After founding your village, gather resources manually as you lay the building blocks of a new settlement.

Construct essential buildings, unlock new production chains and attract villagers who can automate more of your economy. As your settlement grows, so does its value and experience.

Gain experience each time you and your villagers are put to work through manual or automated production. Level up to earn Village Points that can then be spent on permanent upgrades to improve things such as Gather Speed and Production Efficiency.

When progress starts to become slow, relocate and find a new village to start again, carrying with you your hard earned knowledge to progress your new village faster.

Expansion and growth does not come without risk. External threats will attempt to attack your village, steal resources and kill your villagers. These threats will grow stronger over time, forcing you to balance expansion with survival or be forced to relocate.

Assign villagers to help defend, craft armour and defence structures to prepare your village to withstand increasingly dangerous attacks.

Features

• Build and expand a medieval village from a small starting settlement

• Gather base resources manually, then automate production with villagers

• Unlock new buildings, refinement chains, and progression paths

• Earn experience from village activity and level up for Village Points

• Spend permanent upgrades to improve future runs

• Relocate and rebuild stronger through a prestige-style progression loop

• Defend your village against escalating attacks with defenders and crafted armor

• Balance growth, automation, and survival in a long-term idle progression system
description_short: An interactive idle game with a relaxing medieval setting. Start from nothing and slowly build your village by gathering resources and hiring villagers to populate and help build.
